refined_analysis.technical_details: Intermittent test failures stem from unsynchronized access and lifecycle management in NativeLayer.cpp, particularly in the finalization and cleanup paths involving native surface destruction and JSClass finalization. The timing of mask layer transform rendering and native surface cleanup overlaps, causing race conditions and occasional crashes. Logs implicate NativeLayer::Finalize and related cleanup functions as key failure points.
refined_analysis.user_impact: Test instability reduces developer confidence and may conceal subtle graphics rendering bugs.
refined_analysis.proposed_fix_approach: Focus on synchronization around native surface cleanup and mask layer transform timing in NativeLayer.cpp, especially in NativeLayer::Finalize and related lifecycle methods. Add detailed logging to expose race conditions. Introduce synchronization primitives (e.g., fences or barriers) to ensure mask layer rendering completes before JSClass finalization and surface destruction.
